mapper.sql: WHERE c.GEOCODE_YN = 'Y' AND j.USE_YN = 'Y' AND j.DEL_YN = 'N' AND c.LAT BETWEEN #{swLat} AND #{neLat} AND c.LNG BETWEEN #{swLng} AND #{neLng} AND ( j.CLOSE_DT IS NULL OR TRIM(j.CLOSE_DT) = '' OR TRIM(j.CLOSE_DT) IN ('상시채용', '채용시까지') OR TRIM(j.CLOSE_DT) NOT REGEXP '^[0-9]{4}[-.]?[0-9]{1,2}[-.]?[0-9]{1,2}$' OR ( CASE WHEN TRIM(j.CLOSE_DT) REGEXP '^[0-9]{8}$' THEN STR_TO_DATE(TRIM(j.CLOSE_DT), '%Y%m%d') ELSE STR_TO_DATE(REPLACE(TRIM(j.CLOSE_DT), '.', '-'), '%Y-%c-%e') END ) >= CURDATE() )

AND ( j.CLOSE_DT IS NULL OR TRIM(j.CLOSE_DT) = '' OR TRIM(j.CLOSE_DT) IN ('상시채용', '채용시까지') OR TRIM(j.CLOSE_DT) NOT REGEXP '^[0-9]{4}[-.]?[0-9]{1,2}[-.]?[0-9]{1,2}$' OR ( CASE WHEN TRIM(j.CLOSE_DT) REGEXP '^[0-9]{8}$' THEN STR_TO_DATE(TRIM(j.CLOSE_DT), '%Y%m%d') ELSE STR_TO_DATE(REPLACE(TRIM(j.CLOSE_DT), '.', '-'), '%Y-%c-%e') END ) >= CURDATE() )

sql.if: AND j.SOURCE_TYPE COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = '공공' COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci
AND j.SOURCE_TYPE COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = '민간' COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci
AND (j.COMPANY LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ESCAPE '\\' OR j.TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ESCAPE '\\' OR j.JOBS_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ESCAPE '\\')

if.test: sourceType == 'PUB' and jobNcsCd != null and jobNcsCd.size() > 0
sourceType == 'PUB' and jobCareerCd != null and jobCareerCd.size() > 0
sourceType == 'PUB' and jobAcdmcrCd != null and jobAcdmcrCd.size() > 0
sourceType == 'PUB' and jobEmpTpCd != null and jobEmpTpCd.size() > 0

sql.if:
AND (
( FIND_IN_SET(#{code}, REPLACE(COALESCE(j.JOB_EMP_TP_CD, ''), ' ', '')) > 0 OR FIND_IN_SET(SUBSTRING(#{code}, 4, 1), REPLACE(COALESCE(j.JOB_EMP_TP_CD, ''), ' ', '')) > 0 OR FIND_IN_SET(CONCAT('0', SUBSTRING(#{code}, 4, 1)), REPLACE(COALESCE(j.JOB_EMP_TP_CD, ''), ' ', '')) > 0
OR (#{code} = 'R1010' AND FIND_IN_SET('10', REPLACE(COALESCE(j.JOB_EMP_TP_CD, ''), ' ', '')) > 0) OR (#{code} = 'R1010' AND FIND_IN_SET('11', REPLACE(COALESCE(j.JOB_EMP_TP_CD, ''), ' ', '')) > 0) OR (#{code} = 'R1020' AND FIND_IN_SET('20', REPLACE(COALESCE(j.JOB_EMP_TP_CD, ''), ' ', '')) > 0) OR (#{code} = 'R1020' AND FIND_IN_SET('21', REPLACE(COALESCE(j.JOB_EMP_TP_CD, ''), ' ', '')) > 0) OR (#{code} = 'R1010' AND FIND_IN_SET('정규직', REPLACE(COALESCE(j.EMP_TP_NM, ''), ' ', '')) > 0) OR (#{code} = 'R1020' AND FIND_IN_SET('계약직', REPLACE(COALESCE(j.EMP_TP_NM, ''), ' ', '')) > 0) OR (#{code} = 'R1030' AND FIND_IN_SET('무기계약직', REPLACE(COALESCE(j.EMP_TP_NM, ''), ' ', '')) > 0) OR (#{code} = 'R1040' AND FIND_IN_SET('비정규직', REPLACE(COALESCE(j.EMP_TP_NM, ''), ' ', '')) > 0) OR (#{code} = 'R1050' AND FIND_IN_SET('청년인턴', REPLACE(COALESCE(j.EMP_TP_NM, ''), ' ', '')) > 0) OR (#{code} = 'R1060' AND FIND_IN_SET('체험형', REPLACE(COALESCE(j.EMP_TP_NM, ''), ' ', '')) > 0) OR (#{code} = 'R1070' AND FIND_IN_SET('채용형', REPLACE(COALESCE(j.EMP_TP_NM, ''), ' ', '')) > 0) )
)

if.test: sourceType == 'PRV' and prvEmpTpCd != null and prvEmpTpCd.size() > 0
sourceType == 'PRV' and prvCareerCd != null and prvCareerCd.size() > 0
sourceType == 'PRV' and prvEduCd != null and prvEduCd.size() > 0
sourceType == 'PRV' and prvJobCd != null and prvJobCd.size() > 0
salaryNoCondition == false and salaryType != null and salaryType != ''

mapper.select:
SELECT j.WANTED_AUTH_NO AS wantedAuthNo, j.SOURCE AS source, j.SOURCE_TYPE AS sourceType, j.COMPANY AS company, j.TITLE AS title, j.JOBS_NM AS jobsNm, j.JOBS_CD AS jobsCd, j.EMP_TP_NM AS empTpNm, j.CAREER AS career, j.MIN_EDUBG AS minEdubg, j.SAL_AMT AS salAmt, j.SAL_TP_NM AS salTpNm, j.REGION AS region, j.CLOSE_DT AS closeDt, j.WANTED_INFO_URL AS wantedInfoUrl, j.BASIC_ADDR AS basicAddr, j.INFO_SVC AS infoSvc, j.JOB_CAREER_CD AS jobCareerCd, j.JOB_ACDMCR_CD AS jobAcdmcrCd, j.JOB_EMP_TP_CD AS jobEmpTpCd, j.JOB_AREA_CD AS jobAreaCd, j.JOBABA_CMMN_276_CD AS jobabaCmmn276Cd, j.JOBABA_CMMN_274_CD AS jobabaCmmn274Cd, c.LAT AS lat, c.LNG AS lng FROM jwrki.v_job_posting j INNER JOIN jwrki.tb_empmn_map_coord c ON j.WANTED_AUTH_NO = c.WANTED_AUTH_NO
ORDER BY CASE WHEN j.CLOSE_DT REGEXP '^[0-9]{4}-[0-9]{2}-[0-9]{2}$' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, j.CLOSE_DT ASC, j.REG_DT DESC
ORDER BY j.REG_DT DESC
LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM jwrki.v_job_posting j INNER JOIN jwrki.tb_empmn_map_coord c ON j.WANTED_AUTH_NO = c.WANTED_AUTH_NO

SELECT j.WANTED_AUTH_NO AS wantedAuthNo, j.SOURCE AS source, j.SOURCE_TYPE AS sourceType, j.COMPANY AS company, j.TITLE AS title, j.JOBS_NM AS jobsNm, j.EMP_TP_NM AS empTpNm, j.CAREER AS career, j.MIN_EDUBG AS minEdubg, j.SAL_AMT AS salAmt, j.SAL_TP_NM AS salTpNm, j.REGION AS region, j.CLOSE_DT AS closeDt, j.WANTED_INFO_URL AS wantedInfoUrl, j.BASIC_ADDR AS basicAddr, j.DETAIL_ADDR AS detailAddr, j.INFO_SVC AS infoSvc, j.JOB_CAREER_CD AS jobCareerCd, j.JOB_ACDMCR_CD AS jobAcdmcrCd, j.JOB_EMP_TP_CD AS jobEmpTpCd, j.JOB_AREA_CD AS jobAreaCd, j.JOBABA_CMMN_276_CD AS jobabaCmmn276Cd, j.JOBABA_CMMN_274_CD AS jobabaCmmn274Cd, c.LAT AS lat, c.LNG AS lng FROM jwrki.v_job_posting j LEFT JOIN jwrki.tb_empmn_map_coord c ON j.WANTED_AUTH_NO = c.WANTED_AUTH_NO WHERE j.WANTED_AUTH_NO = #{wantedAuthNo} AND j.USE_YN = 'Y' AND j.DEL_YN = 'N'
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM jwrki.v_job_posting WHERE WANTED_AUTH_NO = #{wantedAuthNo} AND USE_YN = 'Y' AND DEL_YN = 'N'

SELECT j.WANTED_AUTH_NO AS wantedAuthNo, j.SOURCE AS source, j.SOURCE_TYPE AS sourceType, j.COMPANY AS company, j.TITLE AS title, j.JOBS_NM AS jobsNm, j.JOBS_CD AS jobsCd, j.EMP_TP_NM AS empTpNm, j.CAREER AS career, j.MIN_EDUBG AS minEdubg, j.SAL_AMT AS salAmt, j.SAL_TP_NM AS salTpNm, j.REGION AS region, j.CLOSE_DT AS closeDt, j.WANTED_INFO_URL AS wantedInfoUrl, j.BASIC_ADDR AS basicAddr, j.DETAIL_ADDR AS detailAddr, j.INFO_SVC AS infoSvc, j.JOB_CAREER_CD AS jobCareerCd, j.JOB_ACDMCR_CD AS jobAcdmcrCd, j.JOB_EMP_TP_CD AS jobEmpTpCd, j.JOB_AREA_CD AS jobAreaCd, j.JOBABA_CMMN_276_CD AS jobabaCmmn276Cd, j.JOBABA_CMMN_274_CD AS jobabaCmmn274Cd FROM jwrki.v_job_posting j LEFT JOIN jwrki.tb_empmn_map_coord c ON j.WANTED_AUTH_NO = c.WANTED_AUTH_NO WHERE j.USE_YN = 'Y' AND j.DEL_YN = 'N' AND j.BASIC_ADDR IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(j.BASIC_ADDR) != '' AND (c.WANTED_AUTH_NO IS NULL OR c.GEOCODE_YN = 'N')
ORDER BY j.REG_DT DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO jwrki.tb_empmn_map_coord (WANTED_AUTH_NO, LAT, LNG, GEOCODE_YN, REG_DT) VALUES (#{wantedAuthNo}, #{lat}, #{lng}, #{geocodeYn}, NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE LAT = #{lat}, LNG = #{lng}, GEOCODE_YN = #{geocodeYn}
